title: Can Cockroaches Fly Solo
summary:
Main
‘…when you see one cockroach, there's probably more'
Jamie Dimon, CEO, JP Morgan
Fears over potential credit losses in US peripheral banks causing a systemic credit event have somewhat subsided. Investors and businesses, however, are still somewhat worried. Losses appear to be small relative to the banks' balance sheets.
